description: State-scoped, attribute-scoped, and unscoped state triggers on the same entity diverge correctly across an attribute-only tick, an attribute-scoped match tick, and a genuine state transition.

events.note: attribute-only tick; state string unchanged and happens to equal state-scoped's to: value

results.reason: attribute-only tick: state-scoped must not fire even though the unchanged state equals its to: value; unscoped fires on any change; attribute-scoped's own attribute (volume) did not move
volume transitioned 20->25, matching attribute-scoped's from/to; state string still unchanged so state-scoped stays excluded
genuine transition to paused, not playing, so state-scoped (to:"playing") does not match this transition either
